data.body:
**Completion verification: PASS**

Verified all four acceptance criteria against the repository. Every requirement is demonstrably met:

1. **4-pass offline skeleton** ‚Äî `src/rebar/llm/workflow/examples/review_skeleton.yaml` implements the full `overlay_triggers ‚Üí batch finder (with per-criterion `when`) ‚Üí aggregate verify ‚Üí decide` pipeline. `PlannedTraceRunner` wraps `FakeAgentRunner` (zero live calls). Tests `test_skeleton_runs_offline_with_conditional_inclusion_and_journaled_plan` and `test_security_criterion_excluded_when_plan_is_clean` assert end-to-end correctness including conditional inclusion/exclusion.

2. **PLANNED-TRACE captured** ‚Äî `src/rebar/llm/workflow/trace.py` implements `PlannedTraceRunner` recording `{prompt, model, mode, call_mode, criteria}` per LLM call before delegating to the inner fake. `test_planned_trace_is_captured_offline` asserts all parity fields are present, the batch finder and aggregate verifier prompts appear, and the batched criteria set is captured ‚Äî proving epic B's parity-validation mechanism is emittable offline.

3. **Flaws surfaced + fixed** ‚Äî Two flaws are documented in the test module docstring and ticket comment. Flaw 1 (linter skipped batch nested prompts) is fixed in `lint.py` lines 161‚Äì168 (`lint_prompt_refs` now existence-checks `batch.prompt` + `criteria[].prompt`); `test_linter_now_flags_an_unknown_batch_prompt` pins the fix. Flaw 2 (criteria-library‚Üîprompt-library wiring) is recorded as a B prerequisite, not deferred silently.

4. **Disposable label** ‚Äî The workflow file is prominently annotated `# DISPOSABLE de-risking skeleton` with an explicit note "Epic B REMOVES this file after the migration; meanwhile it is the visual-editing sample." The ticket comment confirms `make lint` clean and full suite passing.
